name: @forwardimpact/libindex
description: JSONL-backed indexes with filtering and buffered writes — fast context lookup without an external search engine.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Searching for context in a growing dataset and realizing a full-text engine is overkill but grep is too slow.
jobs.bigHire: look up context fast without an external search engine.
jobs.littleHire: filter and scan a JSONL index without loading it all into memory.
jobs.competesWith: full-text search engines; raw file scanning; loading entire datasets into memory
